notes: Christian bishop known for firm faith and pastoral leadership, mentioned by Eusebius and Pope Leo the Great.

docs.title: Ecclesiastical History, Book 6
docs.author: Eusebius
docs.excerpt: And this most godly Dioscorus is among us now, awaiting a longer conflict and more severe contest. 21. But a certain Nemesion, who also was an Egyptian , was accused as an associate of robbers ; but when he had cleared himself before the centurion of this charge most
